notes: w8mscan is read-only scanner evidence; OpenUdon owns the eval fixture and does not depend on w8m or n8n at eval runtime.
The fixture models only the Slack message/post node as a single OpenUdon http step.
The source workflow also contains manualTrigger and noOp nodes; those are n8n workflow-shell behavior outside this one-operation eval slice.
The copied w8m OpenAPI evidence listed postMessage but did not include request body, response schema, server, or security detail.
This fixture enriches only the local postMessage request and response schema needed for OpenUdon quality assessment.

Slack authentication is documented as credential binding slack_bot_token in project.md, but OpenAPI security is not asserted in this fixture because the copied evidence does not contain a complete security scheme.
